title: Xi and Putin meet ahead of Beijing Olympics in mutual show of support amid tensions with West
description: Russian President landed in Beijing on Friday, becoming the first world leader to meet China’s Xi Jinping in more than two years
keywords: Olympics, china, russia, putin, beijing, moscow, ukraine, meeting, Russia, Antony Blinken, Peter Harrell, Marshall Fund
snippet:
Russian President Vladimir Putin attends a meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing.SPUTNIK/Reuters
